title: Chief Technology Officer
summary: The technology leader responsible for software architecture, security, resilience, scalability, and production engineering discipline.
biography: This executive seat is available. Neuroartan has defined the Chief Technology Officer role as a real operating standard before appointing a public holder.
The technology leader responsible for software architecture, security, resilience, scalability, and production engineering discipline.
The public profile is intentionally role-first until a human executive is hired, verified, and approved for publication.
mandate: Build and govern the technical system that allows Neuroartan to become stable, secure, expandable, and operational across platforms.
source_posture: Governed role placeholder for future executive hiring
